plain_definition: An early-stage approval VARA (Dubai's virtual-asset regulator) can grant a firm before it has completed the full licensing process -- confirmation the firm may proceed with its application, not a final operating licence.
formal_definition: VARA's own announcement of Enjinstarter MENA's approval states the firm 'has been granted initial approval by Dubai's Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA), while it undertakes the in-depth process of applying for a licence, in accordance with VARA requirements.' The announcement does not itself define 'initial approval' as a formally named stage within a wider, publicly documented licensing sequence, so this entry records only what VARA's own text states about this specific grant; it is not asserted to be equivalent to the separately documented 'provisional approval' or 'MVP licence' stages (see mvp-licence) without further primary-source confirmation.
